%%(color:rgb(30, 30, 30);font-style:normal;font-variant-ligatures:normal;font-variant-caps:normal;letter-spacing:normal;orphans:2;text-align:left;text-indent:0px;text-transform:none;widows:2;word-spacing:0px;-webkit-text-stroke-width:0px;white-space:normal;background-color:rgb(245, 255, 255);text-decoration-thickness:initial;text-decoration-style:initial;text-decoration-color:initial;display:inline !important;float:none;)舒适制动（Comfortable Stop简称CST )功能是一个可选的舒适性功能，该功能致力于解决车辆前进行驶非紧急制动工况车辆刹停前出现的减速度波动，降低车辆制动俯仰，使用制动 （只考虑电制动可选）和 悬架控制（阻尼，刚度和高度）实现舒适制动的效果。%!_x000D_
_x000D_
\\_x000D_
_x000D_
Comfortable Stop (CST) is an optional comfort feature designed to address deceleration fluctuations occurring before vehicle braking in non~-emergency braking scenarios during forward motion. It reduces vehicle braking pitch by utilizing braking (considering only electric braking as an option) and suspension control (damping~, stiffness~, and height) to achieve a comfortable braking effect.
